name: X-Golf El Dorado Hills
address: 2085 Vine St Suite 201, El Dorado Hills, CA 95762
about: X-Golf El Dorado Hills is a golf simulator facility offering 7 state-of-the-art golf simulators. The venue provides a comprehensive environment for play, training, and entertainment, with a full bar, food and beverage options, and space for up to 150 guests. Pricing is per simulator, per hour, accommodating up to 6 people per bay, with rates varying by day and time.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the world's most accurate golf simulator with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Year-round play and training regardless of weather conditions
A social atmosphere with live TV sports, a bar, and events like DJ trivia and watch parties

food_and_drink.notes: Tasty bites available; menu available online
Full bar with beer and wine; specials available for events

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available. Adult premium TaylorMade clubs are $15 per session, and Kids U.S. Kids clubs are $10 per session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and offers food and beverages for purchase. BYOB is not mentioned as an option.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each individual can finish 18 holes in about one hour. If you add more people, it will take approximately one hour per person added to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome. The facility offers junior lessons and events suitable for families.
